en: Don't stand at the back of the stage with your hands in your pockets, looking around
ko: 주머니에 손을 넣고 무대 뒤쪽에 서서 여기 아닌 다른 곳에 있기를 바라는 듯이 둘러보지 마세요.

en: as though you wished you were anywhere but here. Oh!
ko: 아, 정말로 잘못 생각하고 계십니다, 선생님. 정말로 잘못 생각하고 계십니다.

en: You couldn't be more wrong, sir. You couldn't be more wrong. Oh, genuinely.
And if it looked like that, I'm so sorry.
ko: 하지만 상을 수여할 때는 그냥 빨리 진행하세요.

en: But when you come up and present an award, just f***ing get on with it.

ko: 제가 앉아 있던 자리에서 당신의 배가 보였습니다.

en: From where I was sitting, I can see your belly.
And that was right over there, at the back of the room.
These people down here, you know.
Sorry, I'm waiting for the punchline. Go on.

ko: 제 배가 보이고 여러분은 지금 죽어가고 있는 걸 모두 볼 수 있습니다. 시작합시다. 자, 한 번 더.

en: You can see my belly and we can all see you dying right now. Let's go for it. There we go. One more.
